metadata.source_paper: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
metadata.region: East Arm of Sulawesi, Luwuk area, Indonesia
metadata.notes: Tectonic geomorphology study using 7 morphometric indices on 8 sub-watersheds. Confirms Batui Thrust as active fault. Uplift rates derived from Celebes Molasse and Salodik Formation elevations.

hikmy_2025.apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
hikmy_2025.topic: Tectonic geomorphology, uplift rate, active faults

properties.name: Batui Thrust — activa NE-SW Luwuk
properties.full_name: Batui Thrust — falla inversa activa NE-SW, frontera ESO/Banggai-Sula en el area de Luwuk
properties.tectonic_context: Boundary between East Sulawesi Ophiolite and Banggai-Sula Microcontinent
properties.extraction_notes: Traza digitalizada de Fig. 6 y 7. Coordenadas aproximadas de la zona de Luwuk/Pagimana segun Fig. 1 y mapa geologico regional.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Batui Thrust confirmada como falla activa por morfometria (7 indices en 8 sub-cuencas) y datos de campo. Plano: N256E/58NW, cinematica Left Thrust Slip. Segmentada por fallas wrench. Desplazamiento observado en Rio Boimbin: throw 12m, heave 3m separando arenisca Poh Fm y serpentinita ofiolita.

properties.name: Pasini Thrust — activa NE-SW
properties.full_name: Pasini Thrust — falla inversa activa NE-SW, 2.7 km al SE del Batui Thrust
properties.extraction_notes: Posicion aproximada a 2.7 km al SE del Batui Thrust segun descripcion en texto. Coordenadas estimadas de Fig. 7.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Pasini Thrust a 2.7 km SE del Batui Thrust. Throw vertical 10-25 m, visible hasta 300 m. Crestas disectadas con orientacion NNE-SSW. Morfometria (Vf, Smf, SL) confirma actividad reciente. Influencia el sub-watershed Pakowa.

properties.name: Lobu-Balolang Fault Zone — NW-SE
properties.full_name: Zona de Falla Lobu-Balolang — falla normal NW-SE, activa en rocas ultramaticas
properties.extraction_notes: Zona de falla dentro del watershed Balolang. Coordenadas estimadas de Fig. 2 y 7.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Zona de Falla Lobu-Balolang con orientacion NW-SE dentro de rocas ultramaticas. Morfometria clasifica watershed Balolang como Moderate Active Tectonics. Sinuosidad del rio Balolang creada por fallas a lo largo del cauce.

properties.name: Batui Thrust Belt — cinturon de cabalgamientos
properties.full_name: Batui Thrust Belt — cinturon de fallas inversas paralelas entre ESO y Banggai-Sula, Late Pliocene
properties.propagation: From ultramafic rocks (ESO) toward sedimentary rocks (Banggai-Sula) within suture zone
properties.extraction_notes: Poligono aproximado del area de estudio cubriendo el cinturon de fallas segun Fig. 7 y seccion sismica Fig. 9.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Batui Thrust Belt: serie de fallas inversas paralelas al Batui Thrust propagandose desde rocas ultramaticas del ESO hacia rocas sedimentarias del Banggai-Sula en la zona de sutura. Seccion sismica 2D confirma el cinturon offshore costa sur del Brazo Este.

properties.name: Tasa de uplift — Formacion Salodik (0.408 mm/año)
properties.full_name: Tasa de levantamiento tectonico del Brazo Este — Formacion Salodik a 1469 m.s.n.m. → 0.408 mm/año
properties.method: Elevation of youngest Salodik Formation / assumed age
properties.marker_depositional_env: Shallow marine, 0-30 m below sea level
properties.extraction_notes: Punto representativo del area de estudio. La tasa se calcula como 1469m / 3.6 Ma = 0.408 mm/año.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Formacion Salodik (caliza arrecifal, ambiente marino somero 0-30 m bajo NM) encontrada a 1469 m.s.n.m. en Pagimana. Asumiendo edad Late Pliocene (~3.6 Ma), tasa de uplift = 0.408 ± 0.008 mm/año. Tasa aumenta hacia el oeste antes del Complejo de Schist de Pompangeo.

properties.name: Tasa de uplift — Molasa Celebes (0.213 mm/año)
properties.full_name: Tasa de levantamiento tectonico — Molasa de Celebes (Fm. Kintom) a 512 m.s.n.m. → 0.213 mm/año
properties.method: Elevation of Celebes Molasse (Kintom Formation) / assumed age
properties.marker_lithology: Polymict cobble conglomerate with pegmatite fragments
properties.marker_depositional_env: Marine, outer sublittoral to upper bathyal (20-250 m below sea level)
properties.extraction_notes: Ubicacion aproximada cerca del Poh Head, extremo E del Brazo Este, segun descripcion en texto.
properties.source_apa: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1-15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
properties.paper_finding: Molasa de Celebes (conglomerado polimictico con fragmentos de pegmatita, Fm. Kintom) encontrada a 512 m.s.n.m. cerca del Poh Head. Depositada en ambiente marino batial superior (~2.4 Ma). Tasa de uplift = 0.213 ± 0.046 mm/año. Tasa regional llega a 2000 m.s.n.m. en el oeste (Fm. Bongka).
